query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO services (name, description, category, basePrice, duration, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
('Interior Detail', 'Deep clean of all interior surfaces, vacuuming, steam cleaning, leather conditioning, and odor elimination.', 'Interior', 149.00, 180, true, 1),
('Exterior Detail', 'Full exterior wash, clay bar treatment, paint decontamination, and hand-applied wax or sealant.', 'Exterior', 129.00, 150, true, 2),
('Full Detail', 'Complete interior and exterior detailing — our most comprehensive single-visit service.', 'Full', 249.00, 300, true, 3),
('Paint Decontamination', 'Iron fallout removal, clay bar treatment, and surface prep for coatings or wax.', 'Paint', 99.00, 90, true, 4),
('Wax / Sealant', 'Hand-applied premium carnauba wax or synthetic paint sealant for lasting protection and shine.', 'Paint', 89.00, 60, true, 5),
('Ceramic Coating', 'Professional-grade ceramic coating application for long-term paint protection and hydrophobic finish.', 'Coating', 799.00, 480, true, 6),
('Maintenance Detail', 'Routine maintenance wash and light interior refresh to keep your vehicle looking its best between full details.', 'Maintenance', 79.00, 90, true, 7),
('Engine Bay Detail', 'Safe degreasing and detailing of the engine bay for a clean, protected finish.', 'Add-On', 79.00, 60, true, 8);

INSERT IGNORE INTO packages (name, description, price, duration, features, isPopular, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
('Essential Detail', 'Perfect for regular maintenance. Keeps your vehicle clean and protected between full details.', 99.00, 120, '["Exterior hand wash & dry","Wheel & tire cleaning","Window cleaning (exterior)","Interior vacuum","Dashboard & console wipe-down","Door jamb cleaning"]', false, true, 1),
('Premium Detail', 'Our most popular package. A thorough detail inside and out for a showroom-ready finish.', 199.00, 240, '["Everything in Essential","Clay bar treatment","Hand-applied paint sealant","Interior deep clean","Leather conditioning","Odor elimination","Tire dressing"]', true, true, 2),
('Signature Full Detail', 'The ultimate detailing experience. No corner left untouched — your vehicle restored to its finest.', 349.00, 360, '["Everything in Premium","Paint decontamination","Engine bay detail","Headlight restoration","Fabric protection treatment","Premium carnauba wax","Detailed photo report"]', false, true, 3),
('Ceramic Coating Package', 'Long-term paint protection with a professional ceramic coating. Includes full paint prep and decontamination.', 999.00, 540, '["Full paint decontamination","Paint correction (1-stage)","Professional ceramic coating","2-year protection warranty","Hydrophobic finish","Maintenance guide included","Before & after photo documentation"]', false, true, 4);

INSERT IGNORE INTO addOns (name, description, price, duration, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
('Headlight Restoration', 'Remove oxidation and restore clarity to yellowed or foggy headlights.', 59.00, 45, true, 1),
('Engine Bay Detail', 'Thorough degreasing and detailing of the engine compartment.', 79.00, 60, true, 2),
('Ozone Odor Treatment', 'Professional ozone treatment to eliminate persistent odors at the source.', 69.00, 60, true, 3),
('Pet Hair Removal', 'Specialized removal of embedded pet hair from upholstery and carpets.', 49.00, 45, true, 4),
('Fabric Protection', 'Application of fabric guard to protect seats and carpets from future stains.', 49.00, 30, true, 5),
('Tire Shine & Dressing', 'Premium tire dressing for a long-lasting, rich finish.', 19.00, 15, true, 6),
('Rain-X Treatment', 'Hydrophobic glass treatment for improved visibility in rain.', 29.00, 20, true, 7),
('Paint Sealant Upgrade', 'Upgrade from standard wax to a synthetic paint sealant for longer protection.', 39.00, 30, true, 8);

INSERT IGNORE INTO businessSettings (`key`, `value`) VALUES
('business_name', 'Detailing Labs'),
('business_phone', '(555) 000-0000'),
('business_email', 'hello@detailinglabs.com'),
('business_address', 'Mobile Service — We Come To You'),
('service_area', 'Greater Metro Area'),
('business_hours', '{"mon":"8:00 AM - 6:00 PM","tue":"8:00 AM - 6:00 PM","wed":"8:00 AM - 6:00 PM","thu":"8:00 AM - 6:00 PM","fri":"8:00 AM - 6:00 PM","sat":"8:00 AM - 4:00 PM","sun":"Closed"}'),
('tax_rate', '0.0875'),
('travel_fee_base', '0'),
('review_link', 'https://g.page/r/detailinglabs/review'),
('review_request_delay_hours', '24'),
('booking_mode', 'manual'),
('instagram', 'https://instagram.com/detailinglabs'),
('facebook', 'https://facebook.com/detailinglabs'),
('tiktok', 'https://tiktok.com/@detailinglabs');

INSERT IGNORE INTO serviceAreas (name, zipCodes, travelFee, isActive) VALUES
('Primary Service Area', '["10001","10002","10003","10004","10005"]', 0.00, true),
('Extended Service Area', '["10006","10007","10008","10009","10010"]', 25.00, true);
